name: wattcloud-monorepo
description: Wattcloud — self-hosted, zero-knowledge BYO cloud storage.

scripts.build:sdk-wasm: cd sdk/sdk-wasm && wasm-pack build --release --target web --out-dir ../../frontend/src/pkg --out-name wattcloud_sdk_wasm
scripts.build: pnpm run build:sdk-wasm && pnpm run build:frontend
